§7Guide Book #9§r
§lWarthog§r
§8MOB§r
 
•§lRarity§r: Common
•§lBehavior§r: Neutral
•§lMob type§r: Medium mammal, Animal.
•§lSpawn in§r: Plains, Forest, Flower Forest, Birch Forest, Dark Forest, Jungle, Swamp, Savanna.

•§lHealth§r: 20 §o(Adult)§r | 8 §o(Baby)§r
•§lWalk speed§r: 0.3
•§lBreathes in§r: Air
•§lTempted by§r: Apples, Berries, Melon, Pumpkin.
•§lHealed by§r: Apples, Berries, Melon, Pumpkin.
•§lBreeds with§r: Apples, Berries, Melon,

Pumpkin.
•§lAging by§r: Apples, Berries, Melon, Pumpkin.
•§lPossible drops§r: Raw Porkchop, Leather, XP Orbs.
•§lAvoids§r: Illagers, Zombified mobs.
•§lMelee attack damage§r: 2-3

§lDescription§r:
§‘Warthogs roam the open plains and dense forests in search of fruit and roots. Though typically peaceful, they won’t hesitate to defend themselves if provoked. They’re drawn to sweet produce like apples and berries, which can
also be used to breed or heal them. Warthogs instinctively avoid dark forces such as Illagers and the undead, hinting at a primal wisdom that has kept them alive for generations.§’
